<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Mail-in-a-Box](https://mailinabox.email) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/mailinabox/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "mailinabox"
  dnsCredentials:
    # MAILINABOX_BASE_URL: Base API URL (ex: https://box.example.com)
    baseURL: ""
    # MAILINABOX_EMAIL: User email
    email: ""
    # MAILINABOX_PASSWORD: User password
    password: ""
    # MAILINABOX_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 4)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # MAILINABOX_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 120)
    propagationTimeout: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
